name: release-tiny-gemini
description: Release a new version of the tiny-gemini Node.js CLI. Bumps package.json, syncs cli.js, updates CHANGELOG.md, commits, and tags. Stops before push and npm publish.

git.description: Git is required to inspect status, commit, and tag the release.

install.linux: Use your distro package manager, e.g. apt install git or dnf install git

node.description: Node.js 18+ runs cli.js for the version verification step.
